title: Chaos erupts as protesting students block Hibernia Street
description: GEORGE NEWS AND VIDEO - Protesting students...
bodyText:
Breaking News
                            Video

GEORGE NEWS AND VIDEO - Protesting students earlier blocked Hibernia Street at the entrance to South Cape College.


> Police were forced to intervene, using stun grenades to disperse the crowd.


This article will be updated with more information as the story unfolds.


> VIDEO: Supplied


Your browser does not support HTML5 video.


> VIDEO: Students of South Cape College are protesting because of NSFAS issues.


Your browser does not support HTML5 video.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
